title: Minimalist Cutout
description: Ce style s'inspire fortement des gouaches découpées d'Henri Matisse, présentant des silhouettes noires pures et audacieuses sur un fond monochromatique plat et saisissant. Il élimine toute ombre, dégradé et détail interne pour se concentrer entièrement sur des contours organiques amples et le jeu dynamique entre l'espace positif et négatif. L'esthétique qui en résulte est d'un minimalisme frappant, hautement graphique et totalement plane.
description_en: This style draws heavy inspiration from Henri Matisse's paper cut-outs, featuring bold, pure black silhouettes set against a stark, flat, monochromatic background. It eliminates all shading, gradients, and internal details to focus entirely on sweeping, organic contours and the dynamic interplay between positive and negative space. The resulting aesthetic is strikingly minimalist, highly graphic, and completely flat.
description_fr: Ce style s'inspire fortement des gouaches découpées d'Henri Matisse, présentant des silhouettes noires pures et audacieuses sur un fond monochromatique plat et saisissant. Il élimine toute ombre, dégradé et détail interne pour se concentrer entièrement sur des contours organiques amples et le jeu dynamique entre l'espace positif et négatif. L'esthétique qui en résulte est d'un minimalisme frappant, hautement graphique et totalement plane.
prompt: Flat minimalist digital vector illustration, pure black silhouette art inspired by mid-century modern graphic design and Henri Matisse paper cut-outs. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The entire composition is collapsed into a purely flat, two-dimensional graphic space. The foreground elements are rendered exclusively as solid, pure black silhouettes with absolutely zero internal details, no shading, no highlights, no gradients, and no midtones. The contour lines are non-existent; instead, forms are defined entirely by crisp, hard-edged boundaries that flow with organic, sweeping, undulating, curvilinear shapes resembling smoothly cut paper or bold, continuous ink shapes. The background is a perfectly solid, uniform, unshaded flat expanse of {{primary_color}}, providing extreme high-contrast isolation for the black shapes. Occasional abstract, flat geometric supporting elements may appear in {{secondary_color}} and {{accent_color}}, strictly adhering to the unshaded, flat aesthetic. The texture is utterly smooth and matte, completely devoid of any film grain, brushstrokes, halftone dots, or digital noise. The spatial dynamics prioritize the graphic interplay of positive and negative space over any realistic perspective, creating a striking, minimalist visual impact that commands attention through stark simplicity. The interplay of light and shadow is entirely omitted, replaced by the sheer graphic power of the solid black forms. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. minimalist graphic design, pure black silhouette, flat vector art, paper cut-out style, organic curvilinear contours, high contrast, solid matte background, unshaded, 2D flat composition, positive negative space, gouaches decoupes, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A pure background scene functioning as a minimalist graphic backdrop, featuring a perfectly flat, unshaded, matte expanse of {{primary_color}}. Scattered across the composition are large, organic, curvilinear abstract shapes resembling smooth paper cut-outs in {{secondary_color}} and {{accent_color}}. The entire scene is strictly two-dimensional with zero depth, shading, or gradients. The edges of the abstract forms are crisp and hard, creating a bold, high-contrast interplay of positive and negative space entirely devoid of texture or noise.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure background scene functioning as a minimalist graphic backdrop, featuring a perfectly flat, unshaded expanse of {{primary_color}} that transitions into a solid {{background_color}} surface. Scattered across the composition are large, organic, curvilinear abstract shapes resembling smooth paper cut-outs in {{secondary_color}} and {{accent_color}}. Placed in the foreground is a decorative, undulating organic border frame in pure black, creating a flat sense of layered depth against the invisible subject. The entire scene remains strictly two-dimensional with crisp, hard edges, zero shading, and no gradients, with the abstract elements and black frame interacting cleanly with the {{background_color}}.
